controls.control_objective: To ensure issue directions to authorised persons through a
controls.control_description:
It may be noted that, whenever necessary, Reserve Bank shall issue directions to
Authorised Persons through A.P.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue directions to authorised persons through a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be amended suitably simultaneously
controls.control_description:
The Master Direction
issued herewith shall be amended suitably simultaneously.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be amended suitably simultaneously

controls.control_objective: To ensure to comply with the requirement of the tax laws, as applicable
controls.control_description:
The Authorised Dealers are required to
comply with the requirement of the tax laws, as applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to comply with the requirement of the tax laws, as applicable

controls.control_objective: To ensure freely utilise all their eligible assets abroad as well as income on such assets or sale proceeds thereof received after their return to india for making any payments or to make any fresh investments abroad without approval of reserve bank
controls.control_description:
A person resident in India may freely utilise all their eligible assets abroad as
well as income on such assets or sale proceeds thereof received after their
return to India for making any payments or to make any fresh investments
abroad without approval of Reserve Bank, provided the cost of such
investments and/ or any subsequent payments received therefor are met
exclusively out of funds forming part of eligible assets held by them and the
transaction is not in contravention to extant FEMA provisions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to freely utilise all their eligible assets abroad as well as income on such assets or sale proceeds thereof received after their return to india for making any payments or to make any fresh investments abroad without approval of reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable
controls.control_description:
Such account will be treated as resident bank account for all purposes and all
regulations applicable to a resident bank account shall be applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible for credit to this account
controls.control_description:
Cheques, instruments, remittances, cash, card or any other proceeds
belonging to the NRI close relative shall not be eligible for credit to this
account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible for credit to this account

controls.control_objective: To ensure operate such account only for and on behalf of the resident for domestic payment and not for creating any beneficial interest for himself
controls.control_description:
The NRI close relative shall operate such account only for and on behalf of
the resident for domestic payment and not for creating any beneficial interest
for himself.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to operate such account only for and on behalf of the resident for domestic payment and not for creating any beneficial interest for himself

controls.control_objective: To ensure be the close relative of all the resident bank account holders
controls.control_description:
Where the NRI close relative becomes a joint holder with more than one
resident in such account, such NRI close relative should be the close relative
of all the resident bank account holders.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be the close relative of all the resident bank account holders

controls.control_objective: To ensure be categorized as non-resident ordinary rupee (nro) account as per the extant regulations
controls.control_description:
Where due to any eventuality, the non-resident account holder becomes the
survivor of such an account, it shall be categorized as Non-Resident Ordinary
Rupee (NRO) account as per the extant regulations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be categorized as non-resident ordinary rupee (nro) account as per the extant regulations

controls.control_objective: To ensure 03, 2000 has been replaced with fema 5(r)/2016-rb dated april 01, 2016
controls.control_description: 1 FEMA 5/2000-RB dated May 03, 2000 has been replaced with FEMA 5(R)/2016-RB dated April 01, 2016.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 03, 2000 has been replaced with fema 5(r)/2016-rb dated april 01, 2016

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable
controls.control_description:
Onus will be on the non-resident account holder to keep AD bank informed to
get the account categorized as NRO account and all such regulations as
applicable to NRO account shall be applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable

controls.control_objective: To ensure be extended to all types of resident accounts including savings bank account
controls.control_description:
The above joint account holder facility may be extended to all types of
resident accounts including savings bank account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be extended to all types of resident accounts including savings bank account

controls.control_objective: To ensure satisfy itself about the actual need for such a facility and also obtain the following declaration duly signed by the non- resident account holder: "i
controls.control_description:
While extending this facility the AD bank should satisfy itself about the actual need
for such a facility and also obtain the following declaration duly signed by the non-
resident account holder:
"I am the joint account holder of SB/FD/RD/Current Account bearing No …….
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to satisfy itself about the actual need for such a facility and also obtain the following declaration duly signed by the non- resident account holder: "i

controls.control_objective: To ensure use the proceeds lying in the above account for any transaction in contravention of the provisions of the foreign exchange management act (fema) 1999
controls.control_description:
I hereby undertake that I shall not use the proceeds lying in the above
account for any transaction in contravention of the provisions of the Foreign
Exchange Management Act (FEMA) 1999, Rules/Regulations made thereunder and
the related circulars/instructions issued by the Reserve Bank from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to use the proceeds lying in the above account for any transaction in contravention of the provisions of the foreign exchange management act (fema) 1999

controls.control_objective: To ensure be held responsible for the same
controls.control_description:
I
further undertake that if any such transaction is put through the said account in
contravention of the FEMA, 1999 or Rules/Regulations made thereunder, I shall be
held responsible for the same.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be held responsible for the same

controls.control_objective: To ensure intimate my bank in the event of any change in my non-resident / resident status
controls.control_description:
I shall intimate my bank in the event of any change in
my Non-resident / Resident status."
4) Meeting of Medical expenses of NRI close relatives by Resident Individuals
Where the medical expenses in respect of NRI close relative (NRI as defined in
regulation 2(vi) of 4 Notification No.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to intimate my bank in the event of any change in my non-resident / resident status

controls.control_objective: To ensure 3, 2000, ibid
controls.control_description: FEMA 16/ 2000- RB dated May 3, 2000, ibid.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 3, 2000, ibid

controls.control_objective: To ensure 03, 2000 has been replaced with fema 5(r)/2016-rb dated april 01, 2016
controls.control_description:
(a) Indian companies or their AD Category - I banks are not allowed to issue any
direct or indirect guarantee or create any contingent liability or offer any security in
4 FEMA 5/2000-RB dated May 03, 2000 has been replaced with FEMA 5(R)/2016-RB dated April 01, 2016.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 03, 2000 has been replaced with fema 5(r)/2016-rb dated april 01, 2016

controls.control_objective: To ensure render themselves liable for penal action as prescribed under fema, 1999
controls.control_description:
(c) Indian companies or their AD Category - I banks using or establishing structures
which contravene the above shall render themselves liable for penal action as
prescribed under FEMA, 1999.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to render themselves liable for penal action as prescribed under fema, 1999

controls.control_objective: To ensure to crystallise, that is, convert the credit balances in any inoperative foreign currency denominated deposit into indian rupee, in the manner indicate
controls.control_description:
7) Crystallization of Inoperative Foreign Currency Deposits - Reserve Bank
(Depositor Education and Awareness Fund) Scheme, 2014
With the objective of aligning the instructions in respect of foreign currency accounts
with the Reserve Bank (Depositor Education and Awareness Fund) Scheme, 2014,
Authorised Dealer banks are required to crystallise, that is, convert the credit
balances in any inoperative foreign currency denominated deposit into Indian Rupee,
in the manner indicated below:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to crystallise, that is, convert the credit balances in any inoperative foreign currency denominated deposit into indian rupee, in the manner indicate

controls.control_objective: To ensure convert the balances lying in the foreign currency denominated deposit into indian rupee at the exchange rate prevailing as on that date
controls.control_description:
(a) In case a foreign currency denominated deposit with a fixed maturity date
remains inoperative for a period of three years from the date of maturity of the
deposit, at the end of the third year, the authorised bank shall convert the
balances lying in the foreign currency denominated deposit into Indian Rupee
at the exchange rate prevailing as on that date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to convert the balances lying in the foreign currency denominated deposit into indian rupee at the exchange rate prevailing as on that date

controls.control_objective: To ensure be entitled to claim either the said indian rupee proceeds and interest thereon
controls.control_description:
Thereafter, the depositor shall
be entitled to claim either the said Indian Rupee proceeds and interest
thereon, if any, or the foreign currency equivalent (calculated at the rate
prevalent as on the date of payment) of the Indian Rupee proceeds of the
original deposit and interest, if any, on such Indian Rupee proceeds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be entitled to claim either the said indian rupee proceeds and interest thereon

controls.control_objective: To ensure , after giving a three month notice to the depositor at his last known address as available with it, convert the deposit from the foreign currency in
controls.control_description:
(b) In case of foreign currency denominated deposit with no fixed maturity
period, if the deposit remains inoperative for a period of three years (debit of
bank charges not to be reckoned as operation), the authorised bank shall,
after giving a three month notice to the depositor at his last known address as
available with it, convert the deposit from the foreign currency in which it is
denominated to Indian Rupee at the end of the notice period at the prevailing
exchange rate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , after giving a three month notice to the depositor at his last known address as available with it, convert the deposit from the foreign currency in

controls.control_objective: To ensure be entitled to claim either the said indian rupee proceeds and interest thereon
controls.control_description:
Thereafter, the depositor shall be entitled to claim either the
said Indian Rupee proceeds and interest thereon, if any, or the foreign
currency equivalent (calculated at the rate prevalent as on the date of
payment) of the Indian Rupee proceeds of the original deposit and interest, if
any, on such Indian Rupee proceeds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be entitled to claim either the said indian rupee proceeds and interest thereon

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the provisions of foreign exchange management act, 1999 and the rules/ regulations/ directions issued thereunder
controls.control_description:
Therefore, their transaction
with a person resident in India will be treated as a transaction between a resident
and non- resident and shall be subject to the provisions of Foreign Exchange
Management Act, 1999 and the Rules/ Regulations/ Directions issued thereunder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the provisions of foreign exchange management act, 1999 and the rules/ regulations/ directions issued thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean making or receiving payment, drawing, issuing or negotiating any bills of exchange or promissory note, transferring any security or acknowledging
controls.control_description:
The financial transaction in this context shall mean making or receiving payment,
drawing, issuing or negotiating any bills of exchange or promissory note, transferring
any security or acknowledging any debt.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean making or receiving payment, drawing, issuing or negotiating any bills of exchange or promissory note, transferring any security or acknowledging

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean any activity which a financial institution is permitted to carry on by the respective act of the parliament or government of india or any regulat
controls.control_description:
Similarly, financial service shall mean any
activity which a financial institution is permitted to carry on by the respective Act of
the Parliament or Government of India or any Regulatory Authority empowered to
regulate the concerned financial institution.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean any activity which a financial institution is permitted to carry on by the respective act of the parliament or government of india or any regulat

controls.control_objective: To ensure lie under the foreign exchange management act, 1999 (fema) against the declarant with respect to an asset held abroad for which taxes and penalties un
controls.control_description:
9) Regularisation of assets held abroad by a person resident in India under
Foreign Exchange Management Act, 1999
To effectively deal with assets held abroad by persons resident in India in violation of
the Foreign Exchange Management Act, 1999 (FEMA) for which declarations have
been made and taxes and penalties have been paid under the provisions of the
Black Money (Undisclosed Foreign Income and Assets) and Imposition of Tax Act,
2015, it is clarified that:
a) No proceedings shall lie under the Foreign Exchange Management Act,
1999 (FEMA) against the declarant with respect to an asset held abroad for
which taxes and penalties under the provisions of Black Money Act have been
paid.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to lie under the foreign exchange management act, 1999 (fema) against the declarant with respect to an asset held abroad for which taxes and penalties un

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to the reserve bank of india within 180 days from the date of declaration if such permission is necessary as on date of application
controls.control_description:
c) In case the declarant wishes to hold the asset so declared, she/ he may
apply to the Reserve Bank of India within 180 days from the date of
declaration if such permission is necessary as on date of application.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to the reserve bank of india within 180 days from the date of declaration if such permission is necessary as on date of application

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted by the reserve bank and proceeds brought back to india immediately through the banking channel
controls.control_description:
In case such permission is not granted, the asset will have to be
disposed of within 180 days from the date of receipt of the communication
from the Reserve Bank conveying refusal of permission or within such
extended period as may be permitted by the Reserve Bank and proceeds
brought back to India immediately through the banking channel.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted by the reserve bank and proceeds brought back to india immediately through the banking channel

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain specific approval for each tie-up arrangement from the reserve bank for facilitating outward remittance services through authorized dealer (cat
controls.control_description:
Prior to omission, it read as follows (the words in italics were inserted on July 28, 2017, and words underlined were inserted with effect from September 07, 2018):
Operating framework for facilitating Outward Remittance services by non-bank entities through Authorized Dealer
(Category I) banks in India
The non-bank entities may obtain specific approval for each tie-up arrangement from the Reserve Bank for facilitating outward
remittance services through Authorized Dealer (Category I) banks in India to effect outward remittances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain specific approval for each tie-up arrangement from the reserve bank for facilitating outward remittance services through authorized dealer (cat

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for ensuring that each outward remittance transaction is in compliance with the provisions of governing regulations in india
controls.control_description:
The Authorized Dealer (Category I) bank through which the service is being offered shall be responsible for ensuring
that each outward remittance transaction is in compliance with the provisions of governing regulations in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for ensuring that each outward remittance transaction is in compliance with the provisions of governing regulations in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for ensuring compliance to kyc/ aml standards/ cft issued by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
The said Authorized Dealer (Category I) bank shall be responsible for ensuring compliance to KYC/ AML standards/
CFT issued by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for ensuring compliance to kyc/ aml standards/ cft issued by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure comprise small value transactions, not exceeding usd 5000 per transaction
controls.control_description:
The remittances facilitated under this model shall comprise small value transactions, not exceeding USD 5000 per
transaction, except for overseas education where the limit shall be USD 10000 per transaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comprise small value transactions, not exceeding usd 5000 per transaction

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted under this model
controls.control_description: Only current account transactions, in the nature of personal remittances, shall be permitted under this model.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted under this model

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted only for fund transfers from one bank account to another bank account
controls.control_description: The remittances shall be permitted only for fund transfers from one bank account to another bank account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted only for fund transfers from one bank account to another bank account

controls.control_objective: To ensure be only made to beneficiaries in jurisdictions which are fatf compliant
controls.control_description: Remittances shall be only made to beneficiaries in jurisdictions which are FATF compliant.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be only made to beneficiaries in jurisdictions which are fatf compliant

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a duly licensed entity by regulator of destination jurisdictions to facilitate remittances to beneficiaries in such jurisdictions
controls.control_description:
The remitting service provider shall be a duly licensed entity by regulator of destination jurisdictions to facilitate
remittances to beneficiaries in such jurisdictions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a duly licensed entity by regulator of destination jurisdictions to facilitate remittances to beneficiaries in such jurisdictions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be kept distinct from service provider's operating account and such moneys should be duly protected from insolvency risks of the facilitating service
controls.control_description:
The remitter's moneys should be kept distinct from service provider's operating account and such moneys should be
duly protected from insolvency risks of the facilitating service provider.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be kept distinct from service provider's operating account and such moneys should be duly protected from insolvency risks of the facilitating service

controls.control_objective: To ensure be on the authorized dealer (category i) bank
controls.control_description:
The onus of ensuring the security of the
remitters funds shall be on the Authorized Dealer (Category I) bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be on the authorized dealer (category i) bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit to the reserve bank every year a certificate stating that the conditions prescribed in the approval are adhered to
controls.control_description: The Authorized Dealer (Category I) bank may submit to the Reserve Bank every year a certificate stating that the conditions prescribed in the approval are adhered to.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit to the reserve bank every year a certificate stating that the conditions prescribed in the approval are adhered to
